mapper.select: select case when a.dsyf is not null then a.dsyf else '合计' end as dsyf, sum(a.rkjf) as rkjf, sum(a.ghjf) as ghjf, sum(a.cbj) as cbj, sum(a.znj) as znj from fydsqk a where 1=1 group by a.dsyf with rollup

select case when a.dsyf is not null then a.dsyf else '合计' end as dsyf, sum(a.rkjf) as rkjf, sum(a.ghjf) as ghjf, sum(a.cbj) as cbj, sum(a.znj) as znj from fydsqk a where dsyf between #{beginRkrq} and #{endRkrq} group by a.dsyf with rollup
